title: Neotinea × bugarachensis
uses: Neotinea × bugarachensis is a rare orchid species that has potential medicinal uses, although further research is needed to fully understand its properties. Some studies suggest that the plant may contain bioactive compounds with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds could potentially be used to develop new treatments for various health conditions. However, the plant's medicinal uses are still largely unexplored and require further scientific investigation. Further research is necessary to unlock the full potential of Neotinea × bugarachensis as a medicinal resource.
parts: Neotinea × bugarachensis is a rare orchid species. Unfortunately, information on its medicinal parts is limited.
